archetype: Archetype 5 (Luxury/Cinematic/Moody) mixed with Retro Pixel aesthetics
design_philosophy: Combine melancholic, poetic themes with 8-bit retro gaming aesthetics. High contrast, atmospheric neon glow over deep obsidian backgrounds. HUD should be minimalist, keeping focus on the Canvas game. Emphasize emotion over typical arcade bombast.

scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl md:text-7xl tracking-tighter font-heading uppercase drop-shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,209,102,0.3)]
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl tracking-tight font-heading uppercase

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use bento-style grids for level select. High negative space for melancholic feel.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look) mixed with Glassmorphism for overlays. 1px delicate inner stroke on cards to separate from background.

buttons.primary: group relative inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 font-heading text-xl text-background-main bg-accents-primary hover:bg-white transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,209,102,0.4)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,209,102,0.8)] uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.secondary: group inline-flex items-center justify-center px-8 py-4 font-heading text-xl text-text-primary border-2 border-borders-default hover:border-accents-primary hover:text-accents-primary hover:shadow-[inset_0_0_15px_rgba(255,209,102,0.2)] transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-wider
buttons.ghost: text-text-secondary hover:text-text-primary font-body uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-sm transition-colors duration-200

cards.level_card: relative flex flex-col p-6 lg:p-8 border border-borders-default bg-background-surface/80 backdrop-blur-md transition-all duration-500 hover:-translate-y-2 hover:border-accents-primary overflow-hidden group cursor-pointer
cards.story_panel: p-8 md:p-16 border-y border-borders-default bg-background-main/95 backdrop-blur-xl max-w-3xl mx-auto text-center

hud.container: fixed top-0 left-0 w-full p-6 flex justify-between items-start z-50 pointer-events-none
hud.progress_bar_container: w-48 sm:w-64 h-3 bg-background-surface border border-borders-default relative overflow-hidden
hud.progress_bar_fill: h-full bg-accents-primary shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,209,102,0.8)] transition-all duration-300 ease-linear

motion.crt_effect: pointer-events-none fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-[linear-gradient(rgba(18,16,16,0)_50%,rgba(0,0,0,0.25)_50%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,0,0,0.06),rgba(0,255,0,0.02),rgba(0,0,255,0.06))] bg-[length:100%_4px,3px_100%] opacity-[0.15]

main_menu.layout: Flex column, centered content, high vertical spacing (gap-12). Hero logo takes up central focus.
main_menu.background: Cinematic dark background (media_assets[0]) heavily darkened with an ethereal glowing 'soul' particle system (or CSS radial gradients).
elements: Actions: Play Button (Primary), Level Select (Secondary), About (Ghost)

level_select.layout: Tetris Bento Grid. Title at top. 1 Hero character card spans col-span-full md:col-span-8 row-span-2. Smaller characters span col-span-4 row-span-1.
elements: Cards contain: Character Portrait (pixel art placeholder), Name (H3), Life-Theme (Overline), Song Duration, Best Time.
Top-left: Current Character Portrait + Soul Health (Glowing orb indicator)
Top-center: Song Progress Bar (Neon amber fill)

pause_menu.layout: Fixed inset-0. Glassmorphism backdrop (backdrop-blur-xl bg-background-overlay). Vertically centered list of secondary buttons.

elements: Stats: Time elapsed vs Song duration
Drag-Drop Zone: border-dashed border-2 border-borders-default p-12 text-center
Form: Shadcn-inspired custom inputs using Outfit font
List: Uploaded tracks with assignable level dropdowns

story_intro.layout: Pure black background. Single text block fading in slowly in the center.

media_assets.description: Use as a heavily darkened (opacity-20 or bg-black/80 overlay) background image behind the title.
Background texture for the level select grid to add depth.
Can be used with mix-blend-screen or CSS mask to create abstract soul light effects.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use text-shadow on HUD elements to maintain legibility over the Canvas game.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='play-button', data-testid='level-card-1').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard React functional components (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS.
Do NOT use TypeScript (.tsx). Use JavaScript (.js).
Include standard Shadcn logic but style it heavily with the raw Tailwind utilities provided here to match the 8-bit cinematic theme.
Add the custom fonts ('Pixelify Sans', 'Outfit') to index.css or via Google Fonts in index.html.
Implement the CRT effect overlay as a fixed div with pointer-events-none over the entire app (excluding the Canvas if performance drops, but preferably over everything).
Keep HUD elements pointer-events-none so mouse clicks pass through to the Canvas, except for explicitly interactive buttons like 'Pause'.
